title: Conditionals
summary: Use if, elif, and else to control branches based on true or false expressions.
content_html:
Conditional statements help a program choose the right branch of logic.

score = 8
if score >= 5:
    print("Pass")
else:
    print("Fail")

exercises.title: True branch
exercises.prompt: With score = 8, what does the condition score >= 5 evaluate to?

exercises.title: Fallback keyword
exercises.prompt: Which keyword handles the final branch when all previous conditions are false?

exercises.title: Check even numbers
exercises.prompt: Print even if the variable number is even.
